title: Access permissions error in Read/Write Files from Disk node
symptom: When using the Read/Write Files from Disk node, n8n throws a 'Forbidden by access permissions' error, indicating insufficient permissions to access the specified path.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
not_this_if: Using a different node for file operations
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n instance running in Docker does not have the necessary permissions to access the specified file path on the host system. This can happen if the Docker container's user does not match the file system permissions of the host.
fix_steps: Add an Execute Command node with the command `pwd` to determine the working directory.
Use the output path from the `pwd` command for your Read/Write Files from Disk node.
Ensure that the specified path has the correct permissions for the Docker container.
agent_instruction: Check the working directory using an Execute Command node and adjust the file path accordingly.
